name: Chorus of Souls
reqs: oath_oathless => chorus_of_souls := 30s BLD, 30s SDW, 30s MTL, 30s WND, 30s LTN, 30s FLM, 30s ICE
additional_info: Grants heavily increased health regeneration if you have all Wisps active. This Talent will not activate unless you have every Attunement's Wisp Mantra equipped and active. If one of your Wisps runs out, this Talent will deactivate until you recast the Wisp. This Talent will not work if you no longer have the Oathless Oath.
desc: Alone, the Wisps lack a voice. But surrounded by so many, the frequencies overlap and you hear it true.
